code-runner.executorMap.python: cd $dir; if ($?) { if (Test-Path ..\..\.venv\Scripts\python.exe) { $p = "..\..\.venv\Scripts\python.exe" } else { $p = "python" }; if (Test-Path ..\..\multi_runner.py) { & $p ..\..\multi_runner.py $fileName } else { Get-Content input.txt | & $p $fileName | Set-Content output.txt } }
